params.name: Confessiones
params.description:
On Aug 26, 1789 AD, after twenty years of work, Rousseau completed his Confessiones.
The Confessiones is a two-volume book with twelve chapters in total, which records the life experiences of Rousseau from his birth to when he was forced to leave St. Pierre Island. Rousseau pursued absolute truth and exposed all of his own shortcomings and mistakes. He revealed that he had lied, cheated, harassed women, and stolen things, all with a strong sense of remorse, reflecting on the reasons behind th …
